resources.string: Please wait while we submit your feedback
To see the nearest public transport stops please enable your location.
An error occurred in claiming the referral code
An error occurred in accessing location services on your device
An update has just been downloaded
Any other issues you had to face?
Are you sure you want to remove this address?
Are you sure you want to remove this route?
1. SELF VALIDATION: Click on the button - Scan conductor QR for validation - and scan the QR code displayed by the conductor
2. CONDUCTOR VALIDATION: Present your pass QR code displayed here to the conductor for validation
"Hi Tummoc. I'm %s. My contact number is %s. I need help with my %s - %s."
Hi Tummoc. I need help regarding my BMTC pass.
Please note down the vehicle or route number and reach out to us if BMTC conductor or line checker refuse to accept your digital pass
"We're sorry. We don't have booking service facility in %s"
Buses going through nearest bus stop
This app needs Camera permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings.
You can not book ride in 50 meter radius
Select a city from the available options

string.name: click_here_to_view_validation_instructions
string.u: Click here to view validation instructions

resources.string: Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are you sure you want to logout?
Cancelling, required permissions are not granted
Describe the problems you faced or give suggestions here...
Do you want to link your social account with existing account?
"Don't see your city listed here? Please provide your city name to help us serve you soon!"
Email and mobile required for tummoc money, Please update your profile.
There are no offers running currently. Please check back later for exciting offers.
"Couldn't find the searched airport rail route."
Enter the 4-digit code sent to you at
Enter the 4 digit OTP sent to
Unable to contact support. Please try after some time.
Failed to login, please try again
Unable to get your pass details, please reconnect to the internet & try again
Missing selfie/ID card details, please go back and try updating the information
An error has occurred in pass validation
Unable to zoom in. Please focus on the QR code and try again.
Oops! Source and destination addresses should be different
Please update your phone settings to use network provided date time and retry
Unable to process the request. Please try again.
Unable to check the payment status
Unable to get the profile details, please retry
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Failed to sign in, play services error
Fetching route details for a smooth trip…
First, select your source then the destination
For app and payment related issues
For conductor, line checker and travelling related issues
Tummoc app helps me find the fastest route to my destination and plan my trips hassle free. You should give it a try! Download Tummoc here: %s
How can we improve your experience?
If you are enjoying our app, please take a moment to rate it on Play Store. We thank you for your support!
"We're not in your city yet! Select a city from the available options"
Let us know the greatest feature that matters to you the most.
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
Allow location access to view available commute options around you
Allow location access to personalize your commute experience
Enable GPS to view available commute options around you
Enable GPS to use location based services
Please enable GPS to track your journey
"We're not in %s yet! Select a city from the available options"
"We're not in your city yet! Select a city from the available options"
"Sorry, We don't have any service at your location."
"Sorry, We don't have any service for %s"
We are unable to fetch your location
Looks like you are in %s, Switch to %s
Get information about live buses and book tickets for metro, bus, airport rail, and more… in
Make sure wifi or cellular data is turned on and then try again.
"No web browser installed on device, can't open web page."
Attribution icon. Activate to show attribution dialog.
Map compass. Activate to reset the map rotation to North.
Showing a Map created with MapmyIndia. Scroll by dragging two fingers. Zoom by pinching two fingers.
Location View. This shows your location on the map.
"Provided OfflineRegionDefinition doesn't fit the world bounds: %s"
Something went wrong, Please try again.
You may move the map to select the exact Location
This app needs location permissions in order to find the device location.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Monthly pass booked on or after %dth is valid only till the month end.
Monthly pass booking window closes on 15 of the month.

"Monthly pass booking window closes on 15th of the month.
Booking for next month will start from %s %s."
Profile is not created, continue without creating?
Refer and earn ₹%d to transfer money to your Paytm wallet or bank account!
Refer and earn ₹%d more to transfer money to your Paytm wallet or bank account!
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Looks like route %s does not pass through %s
There are no drivers available nearby!
"Couldn't find any schedules for the searched route"
Please change your location to see shared location
"Looks like you're interested in %s. Please change your location from %s to %s"
View the ad you saved when you were offline
"You'll get a notification with the link when you're back online"
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Our support team is here to help
Looks like your pass has expired
Please enable location access so that we can provide you more accurate route information.
Please enable location access to see the map view
Please enter the name of bank account holder
Please enter the complete referral code
Please enter 10 digit Paytm mobile number
Please enter a valid email address
Please scan a valid QR code or try again
Please select a stop in between source and destination
Please wait while we check your pass payment status...
Please wait while we check your payment status
Please wait while we collect details to report
Please wait while we initiate your payment
Please wait while we update your payment details
Please enter the last 4 digits of your ID number
Enable Camera permission to upload profile picture
Enable Camera permission to scan QR for bus pass validation
Enable Camera permission to click selfie for pass booking
Please wait while we generate the receipt...
Please wait while we submit the details
Please wait while we get your profile details…
Please wait while we get your bus passes list
Please wait while we update your profile
Please wait while we upload your details
Please wait while we validate your pass
Please wait while we get the details
A minimum amount of %s must be required to withdraw.

Access accurate & reliable public transport info at your fingertips! With Tummoc, commuting is easier than ever! Plan your Trip, find bus & metro info and more | Tummocing > Commuting | Download the app now and use my referral code %s! %s

Access accurate & reliable public transport info at your fingertips! With Tummoc, commuting is easier than ever! Plan your Trip, find bus & metro info and more | Tummocing > Commuting | Download the app now and use my referral code %s to earn %s%d! https://rebrand.ly/tummoc
Refer your friends from Bengaluru and Earn 5 INR directly in your Tummoc Money!
Help other travellers" Report an issue or suggest an improvement"
Please try again after some time
Route your destination & track calories at the same time while you earn carbon save coins
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Please select source and destination within the same city.
To scan QR place inside the box
See the fare and route details
select from the line to view its stops
Select the bus service type you want to view schedules of
Select the train type you want to view schedules of
Click a selfie using the camera on your mobile device
Do not cover your face or wear cap, sunglasses, mask etc. while clicking your selfie
Please avoid too much or too less of sunlight exposure
Take the shot with a straight face and avoid goofy poses
Source and destination addresses cannot be the same! Please check another route
Bus Stop/Metro station too far to walk? Get your first & last - mile rides with Tummoc
Not sure what, when, where, which, transit mode to choose? Plan your trip with Tummoc!
Dealing with long text addresses a hassle? Locate the exact point using just 3 words
Take more rides to save more carbon; refer more people to multiply your carbon saving efforts.
824, HRBR 1 Block, HRBR Layout 1st Block, Extension, Kalyan Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560043

This place seems too far to walk!

Your pass is getting expired. Pull down to refresh your data
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
